body: Task complete: added a current-state SSE enrichment helper so task_update and approval_required can use TaskRecord/ApprovalRecord when the caller has read-model context, while preserving the thin runtime-event fallback. Updated the API tests to cover both the record-backed and fallback paths, and refreshed the Phase 0 migration report wording so the remaining gap is explicit rather than implied. Proof: cargo test -p cairn-api --quiet passed.
